notes: The nav bar now always steps aside when the Now Playing panel is open — floating or docked, any window width — so its buttons never end up buried under the panel (this hit Windows hardest, where display scaling shrank the CSS viewport below the old breakpoint). Right-clicking the playing track — in the bottom bar, the Now Playing panel, or an Up next row — now opens the same menu as a playlist row: download, block, delete, add to playlist. Windows downloads no longer fail with 'environment variable not found' (native fix — update the app itself for that one).
